title: Rune Highlighter
description: Max rune Highlighter for Complex Gaming. HUD Overlay highlights max runes in your inventory without the need for hovering.
body:
# ComplexGaming Max Rune Highlighter
**Highlights Max runes in your inventory without the need for hovering, useful for rune openings.**

![‎ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c83ed075cf6586c5861fa2d4c07b5dcd189d37a6.jpeg)


Toggle mod on and off with H.
shift + H opens config screen. (Can change keybind in settings)
Config allows you to toggle which max runes you want to see highlighted.

![‎ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c31235b5957824c771684c71af67b737d54a2ee_0.webp)

# Installation Guide
Rune Highlighter is only available for Fabric at the moment and requires Fabric API to run.
Modmenu and placeholder API are both optional and not required for the mod to function, but without them you wont be able to access the visual config to toggle certain runes and by default every Max rune that isnt a tier 1 max will highlight.
